backend/ingredient-store.mo: Defines types for skin types, ingredient safety, and ingredient info, and provides a Map-based store with functions to add, get, and list ingredients.
backend/main.mo: Main actor for the skincare app backend, defining all shared types and initializing stores for users, ingredients, products, routines, favorites, and access control.
feature_evidence.json: Records evidence for two implemented features: adding a compatibility rate score to ingredient analysis results, and updating frontend components to display correct per-ingredient safety verdicts with color-coded badges.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, loading html2pdf.js from CDN and mounting the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes and includes a ProfileRedirectHandler that redirects authenticated users without a completed profile intro to the profile intro page.
Displays a list of past skin analysis entries with detected skin type, date, and concern severity badges using icons and color-coded styles.
frontend/src/components/ArticleCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for an educational skincare article with a category badge, title, and content preview. Opens a full-content dialog with a scrollable area when clicked.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Wraps protected content and shows a loading spinner during initialization or a login prompt if the user is not authenticated via Internet Identity. Renders children only when authenticated.
Displays a grid of skincare product cards with price range, key ingredients with compatibility icons, and concern badges, plus a summary ingredient compatibility table below.
frontend/src/components/ConnectivityCode: Renders a tabbed code-example section covering actor initialization, authentication, query hooks, mutations, error handling, and loading states, each with a copyable code block.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/DataFlo: Renders a data flow diagram image alongside annotated descriptions of the five architectural layers (UI, React Query, Actor, Motoko backend, stable storage) and the Internet Identity authentication flow.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/ERDiagr: Renders an ER diagram image alongside entity descriptions and key relationship summaries for the skincare app's data model.
Displays a legend card explaining ER diagram notation symbols: entity rectangles, attribute ovals, relationship diamonds, and cardinality lines.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaD: Renders a database schema diagram image and a grid of SchemaTable components representing all database tables with their columns and constraints.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaT: Reusable card component that displays a database table's columns with their types, constraints, and PK/FK icons; supports junction table styling.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: A button that fetches user profile, analysis history, routines, favorites, notes, and product recommendations, then generates and opens an HTML export page for printing.
frontend/src/components/FileDownloadModa: A dialog that renders the project file tree with per-file download buttons and a bulk 'Download All' option that generates and downloads a ZIP archive of all project files.
frontend/src/components/IngredientAnalys: Provides a textarea for entering comma-separated ingredients, validates input, calls the analyzeIngredients mutation against the user's skin type, and displays per-ingredient safety badges, icons, scores, and verdicts.
frontend/src/components/IngredientCard.t: Displays a skincare ingredient as a clickable card with safety-colored borders, icons, badges, and concern tags. Opens an IngredientDetailModal on click.
frontend/src/components/IngredientDetail: A dialog modal that shows detailed information about a skincare ingredient, including safety classification, description, suitable skin types, and safety warnings for harmful/risky ingredients.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with a sticky header containing navigation links (Resources, Dashboard, Favorites, Journal, Ingredients), login/logout button, and export functionality; renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
Button that uses the html2pdf.js library to export a referenced DOM element as a timestamped PDF file, with loading state and toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a skincare product card with name, brand, price range, concerns, favorite toggle, and a note modal trigger, using React Query hooks to manage favorites and product notes.
frontend/src/components/ProductNoteModal: A modal dialog component that allows users to add or edit a product note, including a star rating, notes text, and usage experience, then saves it via the useAddProductNote mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProductRecommend: Displays personalized skincare product recommendations grouped by category, with support for selecting up to 3 products and navigating to a comparison page.
frontend/src/components/ProductSearchBar: A search input component with autocomplete dropdown for skincare products, supporting keyboard navigation and triggering a callback when a product is selected.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation before proceeding.
Displays skin concern trend metrics (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness) as badges with trend icons, fetched via useGetProgressMetrics, along with an insight summary.
frontend/src/components/Questionnaire.ts: A multi-step questionnaire component that collects skin type and concern answers, calculates SkinType and SkinConcerns from responses, and saves results via useSaveQuestionnaireResults before navigating away.
frontend/src/components/ReminderCard.tsx: Displays a dismissible reminder card prompting users to retake the skin questionnaire if more than 3 months have passed since their last analysis, and optionally shows a seasonal skincare tip.
frontend/src/components/ResultsDisplay.t: Shows the user's latest skin analysis results including detected skin type, active concerns with severity levels, and product recommendations, with a fallback prompt to take the questionnaire if no results exist.
frontend/src/components/RoutineList.tsx: Renders a list of skincare routines with their ordered steps and delete functionality, or an empty state with a link to create a new routine.
Displays tabbed SQL example code blocks (CREATE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs) with copy-to-clipboard functionality for database documentation purposes.
frontend/src/components/TrendChart.tsx: Renders a simple horizontal progress bar visualizing a skin concern's current severity level with color-coded trend indication (improvement, decline, or stable).
frontend/src/components/UIScreenshotGall: Displays a grid of UI page description cards with key features, design elements, and annotations for each app page, serving as a design documentation gallery with screenshot placeholders.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExportData.ts: Custom hook that aggregates all user skincare data (profile, history, favorites, routines, notes) and triggers a JSON file download export.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, returning null if the profile is not found.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, questionnaire/skin type results, product recommendations, ingredient analysis, routines, and favorites, using the ICP actor pattern.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for a healthcare-inspired green/teal color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx: Page that reads product names from URL query params and displays a side-by-side product comparison table using the useCompareProducts mutation, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing the user's skincare analysis history count, favorites, routines, progress tracker, and reminders with navigation links to other sections.
frontend/src/pages/DBMSDocumentationPage: Documentation page for a DBMS microproject that renders ER diagrams, schema diagrams, SQL queries, UI screenshots, data flow diagrams, and connectivity code sections with a PDF export option.
frontend/src/pages/FavoritesPage.tsx: Page that fetches the user's favorited product names and filters the full product list to display only saved products as a grid of ProductCard components.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientAnalysisPag: Simple auth-guarded page that wraps and renders the IngredientAnalysis component.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientDictionaryP: Displays a searchable grid of all ingredients fetched from the API, protected by AuthGuard. Filters ingredients client-side by name and renders each as an IngredientCard.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with a product search bar, CTA buttons for the questionnaire and ingredient analysis, and a features overview section.
frontend/src/pages/ProductJournalPage.ts: Auth-protected page that displays the user's saved product notes and star ratings fetched via useGetProductNotes, showing notes and experience text for each entry.
frontend/src/pages/ProductSuitabilityChe: Auth-protected page where users enter a product name or ingredient list to check suitability against their skin type, with autocomplete suggestions and support for both product lookup and ingredient analysis.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileIntroPage.tsx: Auth-protected onboarding form that collects the user's name, age, and optional email, validates inputs, and saves the profile before navigating to the questionnaire.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionnairePage.tsx: Thin auth-protected wrapper page that renders the Questionnaire component.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesPage.tsx: Public educational resources page with a search bar and tabbed category filter (skin types, concerns, ingredients, routines) that renders filtered ArticleCard components from static content.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Thin auth-protected wrapper page that renders the ResultsDisplay component.
frontend/src/pages/RoutineBuilderPage.ts: A protected page that lets authenticated users create a skincare routine by naming it, adding/reordering/removing product steps (drawn from recommendations and favorites), and saving it via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/RoutinesPage.tsx: A protected page that displays the user's saved skincare routines using the RoutineList component and provides a button to navigate to the routine creation page.
Exports a set of code-snippet strings illustrating how to initialize an ICP actor, handle Internet Identity authentication, and write React Query hooks for data fetching.
frontend/src/utils/educationalContent.ts: Defines and exports an array of educational articles covering skin types, concerns, ingredients, and routines, pulling descriptions from skinTypeDescriptions and the SkinType enum.
frontend/src/utils/exportFormatter.ts: Generates a styled HTML report string from a user's skin analysis history, products, routines, favorites, and notes, suitable for printing or downloading.
frontend/src/utils/fileContentMap.ts: Provides a static map of file paths to their full source-code string contents (including backend Motoko and config files), used for in-app code browsing or download features.
frontend/src/utils/fileTreeData.ts: Defines a `FileNode` type and exports a static `projectFileTree` object representing the full directory structure of the skin-analysis-platform project for display purposes.
frontend/src/utils/ingredientDatabase.ts: Defines a `LocalIngredientInfo` interface and exports a comprehensive array of 70+ skincare ingredients with safety classifications, aliases, suitable skin types, and concern flags.
frontend/src/utils/questionnaireData.ts: Defines a `Question` interface and exports an array of 10 skin-assessment questions with options used to determine the user's skin type and concerns.
frontend/src/utils/readmeGenerator.ts: Exports a `generateReadmeContent` function that returns a static markdown string documenting the project's architecture, database schema, DBMS concepts, and features.
frontend/src/utils/seasonalTips.ts: Defines seasonal skincare tips for winter, spring, summer, and fall, and exports a `getSeasonalTip` function that returns the tip for the current season based on the current month.
Exports a `skinTypeDescriptions` record mapping each `SkinType` enum value to a detailed description including tagline, characteristics, care tips, and recommended ingredients.
frontend/src/utils/sqlExamples.ts: Exports SQL example strings for creating and populating the skincare app's database schema, including tables for users, products, ingredients, routines, favorites, and analysis history with sample insert data.
frontend/src/utils/uiScreenshots.ts: Exports an array of UI page descriptors (Landing, Questionnaire, Results, Dashboard, etc.) with descriptions, key features, design elements, and annotations for documentation or onboarding purposes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/zipGenerator.ts: Generates a downloadable text archive of all project files by traversing the file tree and concatenating file contents, then triggers a browser download.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom typography, container sizing, extended color tokens using OKLCH CSS variables, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including summary, known issues, existing features, and pending feature requests—primarily focused on fixing and expanding the skincare ingredient safety classification and database.
